records.name: Recycled Electronics Feedstock
records.description: A sorted blend of recovered circuit fragments, conductive metals, and reusable electronic substrates. Workshops process it into basic components and repair inputs when new material supply is too expensive or disrupted.
records.visualDescription: Sorted cyberpunk circuit fragments and metal contacts in transparent recycling bins with magenta-cyan inspection light.

records.name: Cryogenic Processor
records.description: A specialized computing core designed to operate at extremely low temperatures with minimal signal noise. It powers advanced diagnostics, mineral analysis, and research systems that demand unusually precise calculations.
records.visualDescription: Black processor module inside a frost-lined containment cradle with cold cyan conduits.

records.name: Precision Optics Assembly
records.description: A factory-aligned package of lenses, micro-actuators, and stabilization hardware. It converts ordinary scanners into reliable survey, inspection, and verification instruments without requiring field alignment.
records.visualDescription: Nested lens assembly with micro-actuators and icy blue optical paths in a graphite frame.

records.name: Navigation Processor
records.description: A rugged route-computation module built to reconcile position, weather, traffic, and port data. Yrethian operators use it to keep cargo and field teams moving when normal routes become unreliable.
records.visualDescription: Sealed marine navigation processor with teal map-light projections and reinforced connectors.

records.name: Cargo Telemetry Beacon
records.description: A compact transmitter that records location, handling shocks, temperature, and seal condition throughout a shipment. Its audit trail helps resolve delivery disputes and identify weak points in a supply route.
records.visualDescription: Dark cargo beacon with teal signal ring, impact sensors, and sealed mounting clamp.

records.name: Energy Cell
records.description: A standardized rechargeable power module used by portable equipment, emergency systems, and small fabricators. Its protected casing allows cells to be exchanged quickly without exposing the internal chemistry.
records.visualDescription: Compact black energy cell with amber charge channels and rugged locking rails.

records.name: Capacitor Bank
records.description: A high-discharge power assembly that stores energy for equipment requiring brief but intense output. It stabilizes analyzers, fabricators, and field power systems during sudden load changes.
records.visualDescription: Stacked industrial capacitors in a vented graphite housing with orange electrical arcs.

records.name: Guidance Processor
records.description: A precision routing core that compares long-distance trajectories, timing windows, and transport constraints. It is used in navigation consoles and research systems where small errors can become major delays.
records.visualDescription: Angular aerospace guidance core with violet-blue trajectory lights and precision connectors.

records.name: Orbital Communications Relay
records.description: A compact relay module that maintains data links across long-distance and obstructed routes. It supports navigation, emergency receivers, and secure communications when local infrastructure is unavailable.
records.visualDescription: Folded communications relay with violet signal emitters and compact aerospace antenna surfaces.

records.name: Identity Authentication Module
records.description: A secure verification component that checks credentials, embedded signatures, and approved access rules. It is installed in regulated terminals and equipment where identity must be confirmed without exposing private records.
records.visualDescription: Black security module with gold biometric mesh and protected credential slot.

records.name: Financial Risk Co-Processor
records.description: A dedicated analysis chip optimized for valuation, currency exposure, and portfolio stress calculations. It expands financial terminals without replacing their primary processor or secure data storage.
records.visualDescription: Gold-traced coprocessor with layered risk-analysis cores in a dark security cradle.

records.name: Environmental Sensor
records.description: A calibrated sensor module that measures water, air, temperature, and contamination indicators. Its standardized output allows the same unit to support portable analyzers or permanent monitoring stations.
records.visualDescription: Cyan-lit multi-probe environmental sensor with sealed sampling ports.

records.name: Water Quality Cartridge
records.description: A replaceable analysis cartridge containing microfilters, reagent channels, and calibration references. It enables a water system to identify contamination while keeping hazardous samples isolated.
records.visualDescription: Transparent cyan analysis cartridge with microfluidic channels and ceramic filter layers.

records.name: Translation Processor
records.description: A language-processing module trained to interpret institutional vocabulary, technical phrasing, and regional context. It helps translation systems preserve meaning rather than merely substituting words.
records.visualDescription: Slim black processor with magenta-cyan waveform layers and modular language ports.

records.name: Public Information Display Core
records.description: A display-control module built for public briefings, verified alerts, and accessible information stations. It synchronizes visual, audio, and interaction outputs from a single protected content source.
records.visualDescription: Compact display core projecting abstract magenta-cyan information panels without text.

records.name: Control Module
records.description: A general-purpose industrial controller that coordinates motors, sensors, and safety interlocks. Its standardized ports make it useful across portable fabricators, warehouse systems, and construction equipment.
records.visualDescription: Rugged graphite control box with red-orange status rails and industrial connectors.

records.name: Hydraulic Actuator
records.description: A sealed linear actuator designed to move heavy loads with precise hydraulic control. It is commonly installed in maintenance rigs, construction tools, and equipment that must operate under sustained pressure.
records.visualDescription: Heavy hydraulic cylinder with orange pressure chamber and reinforced steel joints.

records.name: Inventory Controller
records.description: A warehouse coordination module that tracks storage zones, incoming goods, and reserved stock. It helps business systems prevent misplacement and identify shortages before they interrupt production.
records.visualDescription: Industrial inventory controller with red-orange scanning grid and modular warehouse ports.

records.name: Industrial Motor
records.description: A high-torque electric motor built for fabricators, maintenance equipment, and infrastructure machinery. Its heavy windings and reinforced bearings favor dependable output over compact size.
records.visualDescription: Large black industrial motor with crimson windings and armored mounting feet.

records.name: Heavy Power Coupler
records.description: A reinforced connector that transfers high electrical loads between industrial equipment and protected power sources. Mechanical locks and thermal monitoring reduce the risk of accidental separation or overheating.
records.visualDescription: Armored power coupling with crimson conductor core and heavy locking collar.

records.name: Encryption Module
records.description: A hardened communications component that encrypts data and verifies approved key material. It is installed in media, institutional, and emergency systems that cannot rely on unsecured channels.
records.visualDescription: Black-violet encryption block with electric-blue key lattice and shielded ports.

records.name: Signal Processor
records.description: A high-speed module that filters, compares, and reconstructs complex communication signals. It improves broadcast receivers and analysis equipment by separating meaningful data from interference.
records.visualDescription: Dark processor board with violet-blue signal waves passing through layered filters.

records.name: Secure Communications Array
records.description: An integrated antenna and routing assembly for protected institutional and emergency communication. It maintains several authenticated channels while isolating disputed or unverified traffic.
records.visualDescription: Compact antenna array with electric violet beams and black secure routing hardware.

records.name: Precision Surveyor
records.description: A field instrument for measuring route distance, terrain constraints, and infrastructure exposure. It produces a reusable site report that supports construction, logistics, and verification contracts.
records.visualDescription: Tripod-mounted cyberpunk survey instrument with icy cyan optics and graphite casing.

records.name: Cryogenic Diagnostics Kit
records.description: A portable diagnostic suite for advanced equipment operating under cold or high-precision conditions. It identifies developing faults before failure and guides technicians through controlled maintenance.
records.visualDescription: Frost-lined diagnostic case with cyan probes, processor cradle, and precision tools.

records.name: Mineral Assay Scanner
records.description: A sealed field scanner that determines material composition, quality band, and authenticity. Procurement teams use it to evaluate strategic minerals before purchase or Contract acceptance.
records.visualDescription: Handheld mineral scanner with cyan analysis beam and rugged sample chamber.

records.name: Logistics Scanner
records.description: A supply-chain analysis device that compares lead times, route concentration, and substitute availability. It gives operators a clearer view of where a shipment is most likely to be delayed.
records.visualDescription: Teal-lit logistics scanner projecting abstract route nodes over a cargo module.

records.name: Maritime Route Console
records.description: A planning terminal that compares shipping routes, port costs, insurance exposure, and transit risk. It is designed for cross-border delivery work in a changing maritime economy.
records.visualDescription: Dark marine console with teal route arcs, port indicators, and sealed controls.

records.name: Cargo Integrity Monitor
records.description: A reusable monitoring unit that records handling, temperature, seal status, and transport shocks. Its delivery record can support marketplace claims and Contract dispute resolution.
records.visualDescription: Compact cargo monitor with teal sensor bands and reinforced attachment frame.

records.name: Energy Load Analyzer
records.description: An analysis terminal that models production demand, peak-load exposure, and equipment energy cost. It helps businesses identify inefficient processes before an energy shock becomes an operating loss.
records.visualDescription: Amber-lit analyzer with power-flow channels and graphite industrial housing.

records.name: Portable Power Bank
records.description: A rugged reserve-power unit that stores several standardized equipment charges. It keeps field operations and one emergency device active when normal power access is interrupted.
records.visualDescription: Armored portable power bank with four amber charge cells and locking handle.

records.name: Thermal Management Rig
records.description: A workshop system that controls heat generated by high-energy crafting and industrial equipment. Proper use reduces thermal wear and prevents a production interruption caused by overheating.
records.visualDescription: Copper-channel cooling rig with orange heat exchangers and violet control lights.

records.name: Research Field Terminal
records.description: A portable scientific workstation that organizes evidence, measurements, and authoritative references into a reusable report. It supports research Contracts without requiring a permanent laboratory.
records.visualDescription: Violet-blue foldout research terminal with sample dock and precision display.

records.name: Orbital Navigation Console
records.description: A specialized route terminal for comparing long-distance surface and orbital logistics. It reveals timing windows and reliability constraints that ordinary navigation systems do not model.
records.visualDescription: Aerospace navigation console with violet trajectory rings and dark angular controls.

records.name: Prototype Calibration Bench
records.description: A precision workshop bench used to align experimental equipment and advanced components. It enables demanding recipes while reducing avoidable calibration waste across repeated jobs.
records.visualDescription: Clean black calibration bench with violet metrology arms and crystal reference block.

records.name: Market Lens
records.description: A secure financial analysis terminal that decomposes risk drivers, historical comparisons, and portfolio stress. It does not predict outcomes, but it makes the assumptions behind a decision visible.
records.visualDescription: Black-gold market terminal with layered abstract charts and secure processor cradle.

records.name: Currency Analysis Terminal
records.description: A scenario workstation for testing exchange-rate changes and imported-cost exposure. Traders and businesses use it to compare cross-border quotes before committing scarce capital.
records.visualDescription: Gold-traced currency terminal with abstract exchange arcs and secure dark display.

records.name: Contract Valuation Desk
records.description: A secure operations desk that estimates Contract cost, margin, financing, currency, and delivery risk. It helps players recognize attractive revenue that may hide an unprofitable obligation.
records.visualDescription: Graphite valuation desk with gold risk modules and sealed ledger cartridge bay.

records.name: Water Quality Analyzer
records.description: A portable instrument that evaluates contamination, treatment needs, and filter compatibility. Its test record can support infrastructure, environmental, and emergency-response Contracts.
records.visualDescription: Cyan water analyzer with transparent sample chamber and multi-probe sensor head.

records.name: Infrastructure Inspection Kit
records.description: A field package for documenting structural condition, damage, and repair priorities. It combines measurement tools and evidence storage so inspection results can be reviewed later.
records.visualDescription: Cyan-lit inspection case with scanner, probes, and reinforced glass tablet.

records.name: Environmental Monitoring Station
records.description: A deployable station that tracks environmental indicators and issues threshold alerts over time. It supports water, energy, and public-safety decisions with persistent measurements rather than a single sample.
records.visualDescription: Compact cyan monitoring mast with sealed sensor pods and solar-like panels.

records.name: Translation Console
records.description: An institutional translation workstation that explains terminology and regional context alongside translated content. It reduces costly misunderstandings in cross-border Contracts and official documents.
records.visualDescription: Magenta-cyan translation console with audio waveforms and modular document cradle.

records.name: Contract Field Kit
records.description: A portable documentation system with evidence checklists, source organization, and protected note storage. It helps players assemble clear submissions while working away from a permanent office.
records.visualDescription: Dark field case with magenta-cyan scanner, document film, and modular pockets.

records.name: Public Sentiment Analyzer
records.description: An analysis terminal that compares public narratives, media signals, and economic indicators. It helps distinguish visible opinion from measurable conditions without treating sentiment as objective truth.
records.visualDescription: Magenta-cyan analysis terminal with abstract crowd signals and filtered wave layers.

records.name: Portable Fabricator
records.description: A mobile production unit for basic materials processing, standard consumables, and emergency repairs. It trades speed and capacity for the ability to operate outside a fixed workshop.
records.visualDescription: Compact red-orange fabricator with folding tool arms and rugged carry frame.

records.name: Warehouse Expansion Module
records.description: A modular storage system that adds organized capacity for materials and business inventory. It reduces forced liquidation during supply shocks but still requires careful stock management.
records.visualDescription: Stackable graphite warehouse module with orange inventory lights and locking bins.

records.name: Construction Planning Terminal
records.description: A project-analysis terminal that estimates material requirements, schedules, and infrastructure dependencies. It supports realistic planning before construction resources are committed.
records.visualDescription: Red-orange planning terminal projecting an abstract structural model without text.

records.name: Maintenance Rig
records.description: A heavy service platform equipped for industrial repairs, alignment, and component replacement. It reduces repair inputs and enables work that cannot be completed with a handheld kit.
records.visualDescription: Crimson-lit maintenance platform with armored tool arms and heavy lifting frame.

records.name: Industrial Fabricator
records.description: A fixed workshop machine for producing heavy equipment and processing structural materials. It offers greater capacity than a portable unit but requires substantial power and a stable operating site.
records.visualDescription: Massive black fabricator with crimson furnace chamber and industrial robotic arms.

records.name: Structural Stress Scanner
records.description: A field scanner that identifies load concentration, hidden weakness, and likely failure points. Its inspection evidence helps prioritize repairs before damaged infrastructure becomes unusable.
records.visualDescription: Crimson structural scanner casting a grid across a reinforced steel sample.

records.name: Secure Communications Unit
records.description: A protected terminal for authenticated messages and controlled communication channels. It distinguishes verified traffic from disputed information and preserves correction history for later review.
records.visualDescription: Black-violet communications terminal with electric-blue verified channel rings.

records.name: Emergency Broadcast Receiver
records.description: A resilient receiver designed to deliver verified crisis alerts when ordinary networks are overloaded or compromised. It displays source and correction status so players can evaluate changing instructions.
records.visualDescription: Rugged violet-blue emergency receiver with protected antenna and alert light bands.

records.name: Media Verification Terminal
records.description: An investigative workstation that compares source consistency, disputed claims, and documented corrections. It supports attribution work without presenting uncertain evidence as settled fact.
records.visualDescription: Electric-violet verification terminal with layered media frames and forensic signal tools.

records.name: Sensor Calibration Pack
records.description: A sealed set of reference targets, contacts, and diagnostic materials for one sensor calibration cycle. It restores measurement reliability after transport, repair, or heavy use.
records.visualDescription: Cold cyan calibration targets, probes, and sealed reference chips in a compact case.

records.name: Cryogenic Coolant Cartridge
records.description: A single-service coolant cartridge for cryogenic processors and precision cold equipment. It restores cooling capacity and prevents one temperature-related interruption when installed correctly.
records.visualDescription: Frosted black coolant cartridge with cyan fluid window and insulated couplings.

records.name: Marine Seal Replacement Kit
records.description: A service pack containing matched gaskets, seals, and corrosion-safe fasteners for one marine device. It restores water resistance and cargo-monitor integrity after seal wear or damage.
records.visualDescription: Teal-lit replacement gaskets and seal rings organized in a waterproof service case.

records.name: Logistics Rerouting Kit
records.description: A one-use operations package containing updated route data, permits, and dispatch materials. It allows an eligible shipment to change course before departure and reduce a known delay exposure.
records.visualDescription: Sealed teal route-data module with abstract map chips and dispatch token.

records.name: Portable Energy Cell
records.description: A compact single-charge power cell for standard equipment or one approved emergency action. It is easy to transport but less efficient than a reusable full-size energy module.
records.visualDescription: Small armored energy cell with amber charge core and snap-lock contacts.

records.name: Thermal Stabilization Pack
records.description: A consumable cooling and heat-control package used during one high-energy operation. It prevents a thermal interruption and protects equipment from a sudden temperature spike.
records.visualDescription: Amber thermal gel pads, cooling clamps, and heat indicator strips in a dark pack.

records.name: Research Sample Container
records.description: A sterile transport container that protects one Contract sample from contamination, vibration, and environmental exposure. Its tamper record helps preserve the credibility of later analysis.
records.visualDescription: Violet-blue sealed sample cylinder with shock suspension and transparent inspection chamber.

records.name: Precision Calibration Pack
records.description: A single-use set of measurement references and alignment materials for precision equipment. It supports one calibration cycle or satisfies the calibration input of an advanced recipe.
records.visualDescription: Violet metrology blocks, micro-shims, and crystal references in a clean case.

records.name: Encrypted Data Charge
records.description: A secure data-and-power cartridge used for one advanced financial or Contract analysis. It records the completed report in a protected snapshot before the cartridge is exhausted.
records.visualDescription: Black-gold data cartridge with encrypted light core and sealed terminal contacts.

records.name: Secure Ledger Cartridge
records.description: A tamper-evident cartridge that creates one verified transaction or valuation snapshot. It is consumed during the process so the resulting record has a clear physical audit trail.
records.visualDescription: Gold-traced ledger cartridge with dark tamper seals and protected memory core.

records.name: Emergency Filter Cartridge
records.description: A portable purification cartridge intended for one emergency treatment cycle. It restores limited filter capacity when ordinary replacement supplies or infrastructure are unavailable.
records.visualDescription: Cyan emergency filter cylinder with layered media visible through a clear shell.

records.name: Water Test Reagent Pack
records.description: A measured set of reagents for one complete water-quality sample series. The resulting test record can be attached to infrastructure, environmental, or emergency Contracts.
records.visualDescription: Cyan micro-reagent vials and sampling strips in a sealed field tray.

records.name: Translation Data Pack
records.description: A licensed terminology and language dataset for one extended translation project. It improves coverage of technical, institutional, or regional language not included in a console's basic library.
records.visualDescription: Magenta-cyan data cartridge with abstract language waveforms and secure connector.

records.name: Public Briefing Pack
records.description: A prepared set of display film, accessibility materials, and distribution media for one public briefing. It helps convert analysis into a clear, consistent information package.
records.visualDescription: Magenta-cyan briefing film, audio module, and compact distribution case.

records.name: Machine Tooling Replacement Pack
records.description: A matched set of cutting heads, abrasives, and alignment hardware for one fabricator service cycle. It restores production capability after normal tooling wear.
records.visualDescription: Red-orange cutting heads and precision tooling arranged in a rugged metal case.

records.name: Hydraulic Service Kit
records.description: A one-service package of fluid, seals, filters, and pressure-test fittings. It restores an eligible hydraulic device and supports one heavy-equipment repair operation.
records.visualDescription: Dark service case with orange hydraulic fluid, seals, filter, and pressure gauge.

records.name: Emergency Repair Kit
records.description: A compact collection of patches, fasteners, conductors, and seal materials for one standard equipment repair. It restores limited condition but does not replace a full industrial service.
records.visualDescription: Crimson-lit armored repair case with patches, clamps, and compact tools.

records.name: Welding Consumable Pack
records.description: A measured supply of wire, electrodes, shielding material, and surface preparation media. It supports one structural or heavy-equipment repair performed with appropriate tools.
records.visualDescription: Crimson welding wire spool, electrodes, and shielding canister in a heatproof tray.

records.name: Firmware Patch
records.description: An approved software package that restores one supported capability or resolves a documented compatibility fault. Its signature and version history allow the update to be verified before installation.
records.visualDescription: Violet-blue secure data shard with abstract firmware layers and verification ring.

records.name: Secure Erasure Module
records.description: A one-use hardware module that sanitizes sensitive data before a device is sold, transferred, or dismantled. It produces a verifiable completion record without preserving the erased content.
records.visualDescription: Black-violet erasure module with electric-blue isolation field and sealed port.

records.name: Universal Maintenance Kit
records.description: A standardized set of lubricants, contacts, fasteners, and cleaning materials for one basic maintenance task. It prevents routine wear from becoming a more expensive equipment failure.
records.visualDescription: Red-orange maintenance case with small tools, lubricant cells, and common fasteners.

records.name: Field Medical Polymer Pack
records.description: A sealed crisis-supply package of sterile polymer sheets, barriers, and support materials. It serves as an approved humanitarian Contract input or part of a field-aid recipe.
records.visualDescription: Clean cyan medical polymer rolls and sterile barrier sheets in a sealed pack.

records.name: Protective Packaging Set
records.description: A one-shipment package of impact padding, moisture barriers, seals, and securing hardware. It reduces handling damage and satisfies standard export-preparation requirements.
records.visualDescription: Teal protective panels, moisture wrap, and locking cargo straps in a compact bundle.

records.name: Salvage Sorting Kit
records.description: A controlled set of test tools, containers, and classification markers for one salvage operation. It improves material identification without increasing recovery beyond approved limits.
records.visualDescription: Crimson-lit sorting tray with sample bins, analyzer probe, and salvage tools.

records.name: Precision Sensor Blueprint
records.description: A controlled technical package for manufacturing precision survey and analysis equipment. It defines validated layouts, calibration standards, and component requirements for supported sensor recipes.
records.visualDescription: Cyan holographic sensor diagrams over a sealed black blueprint tablet without text.

records.name: Maritime Navigation Blueprint
records.description: A technical authorization package for constructing maritime logistics and cargo-monitoring equipment. It includes tested routing interfaces and environmental sealing requirements.
records.visualDescription: Teal holographic route-console schematics over a waterproof data tablet.

records.name: High-Capacity Energy Storage Blueprint
records.description: A regulated design package for high-capacity power and thermal-management equipment. It specifies safe cell arrangement, discharge control, and heat-handling standards.
records.visualDescription: Amber holographic energy-cell and capacitor layouts over a dark engineering slate.

records.name: Research Instrument Blueprint
records.description: A validated design set for advanced research terminals, calibration benches, and navigation equipment. It defines the tolerances required for scientific results to remain dependable.
records.visualDescription: Violet-blue scientific instrument schematics projected from a sealed research tablet.

records.name: Financial Analytics Blueprint
records.description: A controlled design package for secure financial analysis equipment. It combines processor specifications, audit safeguards, and data-isolation requirements for supported terminals.
records.visualDescription: Gold holographic financial terminal circuitry above a black secure blueprint slate.

records.name: Water Resilience Equipment Blueprint
records.description: A technical design set for water analysis, filtration, and monitoring equipment. It standardizes compatible materials and safety requirements for emergency and infrastructure use.
records.visualDescription: Cyan holographic filtration and sensor diagrams above a clean graphite tablet.

records.name: Translation Systems Blueprint
records.description: A design package for translation consoles, Contract field tools, and public-information equipment. It specifies accessible interfaces and protected language-data handling.
records.visualDescription: Magenta-cyan interface and waveform schematics projected from a slim black slate.

records.name: Portable Fabrication Blueprint
records.description: A validated engineering package for mobile production and warehouse-support equipment. It balances compact construction with standardized tooling, power, and safety interfaces.
records.visualDescription: Red-orange fabricator and warehouse module schematics above an industrial tablet.

records.name: Heavy Maintenance Equipment Blueprint
records.description: A regulated design set for maintenance rigs, industrial fabricators, and structural inspection systems. It defines load, power, and reinforcement requirements for heavy equipment.
records.visualDescription: Crimson holographic maintenance rig diagrams over an armored black blueprint plate.

records.name: Tier I Workshop Permit
records.description: An entry-level authorization allowing basic materials processing, standard consumable production, and selected equipment recipes. It establishes a legal recovery path for new or struggling workshops.
records.visualDescription: Blank cyberpunk workshop credential with simple silver circuit seal and no text.

records.name: Tier II Workshop Permit
records.description: An intermediate workshop authorization covering specialized components, standard equipment, and structured repairs. It requires greater operating control than an entry permit.
records.visualDescription: Dark workshop credential with layered blue-silver circuit seal and secure chip.

records.name: Tier III Workshop Permit
records.description: An advanced authorization for regulated systems, high-tier equipment, and complex upgrades. Holders are expected to maintain stricter material handling and audit standards.
records.visualDescription: Black advanced workshop credential with gold-violet security lattice and chip.

records.name: Commercial Equipment Fabrication License
records.description: A business license permitting approved equipment to be produced for marketplace sale and Contract delivery. It separates commercial production from personal workshop use.
records.visualDescription: Industrial commercial license card with orange-gold circuit seal and holographic edge.

records.name: Strategic Materials Handling Permit
records.description: A regulated authorization for storing and using strategic materials in approved recipes. It confirms that the holder has access to required safeguards and procurement controls.
records.visualDescription: Dark strategic-material permit with amber containment symbol geometry and secure mesh.

records.name: Emergency Infrastructure Production Permit
records.description: A crisis authorization allowing approved workshops to produce priority infrastructure and reconstruction goods. It enables emergency queues without removing normal material accountability.
records.visualDescription: Emergency production credential with cyan-orange infrastructure grid and secure chip.

records.name: Cross-Border Supplier Credential
records.description: A verified supplier credential used to request foreign quotes and accept cross-border delivery Contracts. It confirms trade eligibility without guaranteeing route availability or price.
records.visualDescription: Global supplier credential with multi-color route lines and dark holographic seal.

records.name: Advanced Salvage and Recovery License
records.description: A regulated license for component salvage, controlled dismantling, and higher-tier recovery work. It expands eligible operations while preserving recovery caps and audit requirements.
records.visualDescription: Dark salvage license card with crimson-silver recovery circuit pattern and secure chip.
